title: Flowfield
description: 10,000 particles following Perlin noise vectors. Tap to randomize.

title: Noise Typography
description: Autonomous characters displaced by Perlin noise. Mouse repels glyphs.

title: Game of Life
description: Conway's cellular automata. Cells age from white through blue to purple. Draw with mouse.

title: Physarum
description: Slime mold agents depositing pheromone trails. Organic network emergence.

title: Particle Gravity
description: 2,000 particles with gravitational attraction. Click toggles attract/repel.

title: Boids
description: 1,500 flocking agents with separation, alignment, cohesion. Mouse repels.

title: Differential Growth
description: Closed curve that grows by inserting points at stressed segments. Mouse pushes.

title: Strange Attractor
description: Clifford attractor with density accumulation. Mouse modulates parameters.

title: Cloth
description: Verlet integration fabric. Drag to deform, double-click to tear.

title: Reaction Diffusion
description: Gray-Scott model producing coral, mitosis, and maze patterns. Mouse injects chemical.

title: Recursive Tree
description: Fractal branching tree with noise-driven wobble. Mouse X = wind, Y = branch angle.

title: Magnetic Pendulum
description: Pendulum over three colored magnets. Chaotic trails. Click to spawn new pendulum.

title: DLA
description: Diffusion-limited aggregation. Slow crystalline growth from center. Click to place seeds.

title: Langton's Ant
description: Five ants with different rulesets competing for territory. Click to spawn.

title: Wave Interference
description: Circular waves with constructive/destructive interference. Click to place sources.

title: Spirograph
description: Layered hypotrochoid curves. Mouse controls radius ratios. Click to regenerate.

title: Text Rain
description: Characters falling like rain with wind. Mouse creates updraft. Click spawns burst.

title: Orbit
description: N-body gravitational system with orbital trails. Click-drag to launch new bodies.

title: Breathing Grid
description: Grid of circles oscillating with distance to cursor and Perlin noise ripples.

title: Typewriter
description: Text appears character by character with amber cursor. Speed follows mouse.

title: Dissolve Text
description: PERCEIVE explodes into particles and reforms. Mouse repels, click detonates.

title: Matrix Rain
description: Monospace columns of falling characters. Mouse creates void.

title: Scan
description: Amber CRT scan line revealing noise terrain. Mouse controls speed.

title: Dither Noise
description: Perlin noise field rendered through Floyd-Steinberg dithering. Pure black and white.

title: Bayer Gradient
description: Animated gradient through Bayer 8x8 ordered dithering. Mouse controls center.

title: Erode
description: White surface slowly eroding and rebuilding. Mouse accelerates dissolution.

title: Glitch
description: Horizontal displacement, static noise, bright blocks. Mouse Y controls intensity.

title: Ink
description: Ink spreading through noise-driven diffusion. Click to drop ink.

title: Smoke
description: Rising smoke particles with turbulence. Mouse disturbs the column.

title: Membrane
description: Elastic wireframe surface. Mouse creates ripples. Click for impact.

title: Pendulum Wave
description: Array of pendulums with slightly different periods. Mouse controls speed and offset.

title: Moire
description: Overlapping rotating line grids creating interference patterns. Mouse controls rotation.

title: Circle Pack
description: Circles growing until they touch. Mouse creates exclusion zone. Click to reset.

title: Grid Distort
description: Regular dot grid warped by mouse proximity and subtle noise drift.

title: Neural Pulse
description: Connected nodes with traveling amber signal pulses. Click to fire nearest node.

title: Signal
description: Layered oscilloscope waveforms. Mouse modulates frequency and amplitude.

title: Contour
description: Animated topographic contour lines from noise field. Mouse creates hill.

title: Cascade
description: Text blocks falling into place with gravity and bounce. Mouse disrupts settled blocks.

title: Field Lines
description: Electric field lines between charges. Mouse is a moving charge. Click to place.
